DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TERMINATING SANCTION, DISMISSING ENTIRE ACTION, ETC. IS CONTINUED FROM MAR-04-2016 TO MAR-16-2016, AT 9:00 AM, IN DEPT. 302/DISCOVERY, OWN THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, TO GIVE DEFENDANTS NASIR PATEL AND NASREEN PATEL (COLLECTIVELY "PATEL") THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PATEL MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 4, 2016 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. (D302)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-16-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS NASREEN PATEL AND NASIR PATEL'S MOTION TERMINATING SANCTION, DISMISSING ENTIRE ACTION, ETC. IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO 2.7B. ON MARCH 4, 2016, THE COURT CONTINUED THE MOTION TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH THE LOCAL RULE AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR FILINGS. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THAT ORDER. IN LIGHT OF THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF MARCH 21, 2016, THERE IS INSUFFICIENT TIME TO CONTINUE THIS MOTION AGAIN. JUDGE PRO-TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: YOLANDA MAZARIEGOS; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Off Calendar May-18-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion Terminating Sanction, Dismissing Entire Action, Etc.
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES:

DEFENDANTS NASREEN PATEL and NASIR PATEL's Motion Terminating Sanction, Dismissing Entire Action, Etc. is scheduled this day.
There being not appearance the Court adopts its Tentative Ruling.

The motion is off calendar because the moving party failed to comply with San Francisco 2.7B. On March 4, 2016, the court continued the motion to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with the local rule and provide courtesy copies of their filings. The moving party failed to comply with that order. In light of the current trial date of March 21, 2016, there is insufficient time to continue this motion again.

Judge Pro-tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion Terminating Sanction, Dismissing Entire Action, Etc.
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. DEFENDANT NASREEN PATEL, NASIR PATEL Motion Terminating Sanction, Dismissing Entire Action, is continued to March 16, 2016, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302/Discovery, own the Court's own motion, to give Defendants Nasir Patel and Nasreen Patel (collectively "Patel") the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Patel must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 4, 2016 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers.
